name: code-review-high-fixes
title: 修复代码审查中剩余的5个HIGH优先级问题：(1) HIGH-5: WindowManager.ts所有execFileAsync调用缺少timeout，需添加timeout:15000；(2) HIGH-6: PortScanner.ts的normalizeState将未知TCP状态默认为LISTENING，应扩展PortState类型或跳过未知状态；(3) HIGH-7: ProjectWatcher.ts在Windows上usePolling:true对大目录性能差，需限制根目录或增大polling interval到30000ms；(4) HIGH-8: WindowView.tsx中showSystemWindows切换时存在scan竞态条件，需用useRef追踪最新值避免旧scan结果覆盖新结果；(5) HIGH-9: useTheme.ts中多层嵌套类型断言(as Record as string)可读性差，需提取类型守卫函数。所有文件在devhub/src/目录下。
creator: ZRainbow
